name: florida_bet
long_description:
### AKA
* Hammer
### Description
* A single match play bet for the full 18 holes with escalating press amounts.
* Lower net score wins each hole. Ties are halved.
* When a player falls behind by the press trigger (default 2 down), a new press bet is automatically created.
* Each press doubles the previous bet amount ($10, $20, $40, ...).
### How It Differs from Closeout
* Press amounts double with each new press instead of staying fixed.
* Stakes can escalate quickly — use the max presses option to set a cap.
